queries.question: List all adventure movies and action movies directed by Sofia Martinez.
queries.sql:
SELECT Film.Title 
FROM Film
WHERE (Film.Film_Style = "Adventure Movie" OR Film.Film_Style = "Action Movie") AND Film.Director = "Sofia Martinez"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?film a :Film .
  ?film p:Title ?title .
  ?film p:Film_Style ?film_style_w .
  ?film p:Film_Style ?film_style_w2 .
  ?film p:Director ?director_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?film_style_w) = "Adventure Movie" || STR(?film_style_w2) = "Action Movie")) && STR(?director_w) = "Sofia Martinez"))
}

queries.question: List all adventure movies and action movies directed by Sofia Martinez.
queries.sql:
SELECT Film.Title 
FROM Film
WHERE Film.Film_Style = "Adventure Movie" OR Film.Film_Style = "Action Movie" AND Film.Director = "Sofia Martinez"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?film a :Film .
  ?film p:Title ?title .
  ?film p:Film_Style ?film_style_w .
  ?film p:Film_Style ?film_style_w2 .
  ?film p:Director ?director_w .
  FILTER((STR(?film_style_w) = "Adventure Movie" || (STR(?film_style_w2) = "Action Movie" && STR(?director_w) = "Sofia Martinez")))
}
